descriptions.description: The 15ml apothecary bottle with a ground glass stopper brings old-world charm to sample sizes. Cobalt blue glass protects light-sensitive essential oils and fragrance oils. Perfume oil, attar, and aromatherapy brands choose this for a classic apothecary look.

A one-ounce apothecary bottle with a ground glass applicator stopper. Clear glass shows product color while the traditional silhouette appeals to heritage and artisan brands. Ideal for perfume oil, essential oil, and concentrated fragrance formats.

The four-ounce pear-shaped apothecary bottle with a glass stopper suits larger volume decants. Perfume oil, essential oil, and aromatic blend brands use this for refillable and collector formats. A statement piece for vanity and retail displays.
